testcase.name: testSearchVehicles
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-22T22:27:33.242+05:30 INFO 47040 --- [roadready] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.roadready.repository.VehicleRepositoryTest]: VehicleRepositoryTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-22T22:27:33.252+05:30 INFO 47040 --- [roadready] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.roadready.RoadreadyApplication for test class com.roadready.repository.VehicleRepositoryTest Hibernate: select v1_0.vehicle_id,b1_0.brand_name,a1_0.id,a1_0.name,v1_0.model,v1_0.specifications,v1_0.pricing_per_day,v1_0.availability_status,v1_0.image_url,v1_0.location,v1_0.vehicle_type,v1_0.sub_type from vehicles v1_0 left join brands b1_0 on b1_0.brand_id=v1_0.brand_id left join rental_agents a1_0 on a1_0.id=v1_0.agent_id where (? is null or lower(v1_0.model) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '') and (? is null or v1_0.pricing_per_day<=?) and (? is null or lower(b1_0.brand_name) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '') and (? is null or lower(v1_0.location) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '') and (? is null or lower(v1_0.vehicle_type) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '') and (? is null or lower(v1_0.sub_type) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '') and (cast(? as timestamp(6)) is null or cast(? as timestamp(6)) is null or not exists(select r1_0.reservation_id from reservations r1_0 where r1_0.vehicle_id=v1_0.vehicle_id and r1_0.booking_status in ('CONFIRMED','CHECKED_OUT') and r1_0.dropoff_time>? and r1_0.pickup_time<?)) fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: testFindByAvailabilityStatus
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select v1_0.vehicle_id,v1_0.agent_id,v1_0.availability_status,v1_0.brand_id,v1_0.image_url,v1_0.location,v1_0.model,v1_0.pricing_per_day,v1_0.specifications,v1_0.sub_type,v1_0.vehicle_type from vehicles v1_0 where v1_0.availability_status=? fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: testFindByAgentId
